items.title: Panel rules NFL teams didn't collude on QB deals
items.summary: An appeals panel upheld a decision that there wasn't sufficient evidence of collusion by teams when negotiating the contracts of Kyler Murray, Lamar Jackson and Russell Wilson in 2022, according to a copy of the ruling obtained by multiple outlets.

items.summary: The Athletic is reinvestigating the coverage of NFL reporter Dianna Russini and the nature of her relationship with Patriots coach Mike Vrabel amid questions raised about the two this week, sources told ESPN.

items.summary: Hilton, who spent a decade in Indianapolis, ranks third in Colts history in receptions (631) and receiving yards (9,691).
